com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.github.dakusui.actionunit.Action.Visitor.Base

extends ActionRunner.Impl
implements Action.Visitor

      • toCallables

        protected Iterable<Callable<Boolean>> toCallables(Concurrent action)
        Description copied from class: ActionRunner
        An extension point to allow users to customize how a concurrent action will be executed by this Visitor.
        Overrides:
        toCallables in class ActionRunner
        Parameters:
        action - An action executed by a runnable object returned by this method.

      • createChildFor

        protected ActionRunner createChildFor(With action)
        Description copied from class: ActionRunner
        Subclasses of this class must override this method and return a subclass of it whose visit(Action.With.Tag) is overridden. And the method must call acceptTagAction(Action.With.Tag, Action.With, ActionRunner).

        @Override public void visit(Action.With.Tag tagAction) { acceptTagAction(tagAction, action, this); }

        Overrides:
        createChildFor in class ActionRunner
        Parameters:
        action - action for which the returned Visitor is created.

        public ActionPrinter createPrinter()
